title: Restore Stable Default Overview Layout and Make Customization Opt-In Only

default_layout_restoration_summary.root_issue: Phase 25A made the draggable tile workspace the normal Overview shell, so the default app opened as a customization grid instead of the stable map-first product layout.
default_layout_restoration_summary.fix: Restored a separate StableOverviewWorkspace as the default Overview path in AppShell.
default_layout: Top navigation remains fixed at the top
CFS Command Center stays above the workspace
SceneView/map is central and visually dominant
right adaptive Intelligence panel remains visible
no draggable tile boxes, edit borders, or layout handles appear by default
default_layout_restoration_summary.custom_grid_default: not rendered in normal Overview mode

customization_opt_in_behavior.entry_point: small Customize Layout button in the Command Center
edit_mode: tile drag and resize handles appear only in edit mode
Reset Layout clears custom layout storage and returns to the stable default Overview

behavior: old v1 custom grid layouts are not loaded into the default Overview
old v1 panel preference layouts are not loaded on app start
Overview command-mode changes no longer auto-persist layout preferences
explicit Save Layout is still available inside the customization editor

edit_mode_toolbar_behavior.helper_copy: Drag or resize panels. This only changes your local workspace layout.
edit_mode_toolbar_behavior.reset_behavior: Reset Layout removes v2 and legacy v1 custom layout storage and exits to the stable default Overview.

workflow_preservation.search_parcel: preserved; browser smoke verified Search Parcel focuses the top search input.
workflow_preservation.selected_parcel_intelligence: preserved through the adaptive Intelligence panel.
workflow_preservation.countywide_layers: preserved; Explore Countywide opens layer controls in the stable left rail.
workflow_preservation.model_lab: preserved; browser smoke verified Model Lab Controls and Model Lab Intelligence appear and unsafe labels do not.
workflow_preservation.planning_snapshot: preserved; browser smoke verified Planning Snapshot Library loads.
workflow_preservation.methodology: preserved; browser smoke verified Methodology loads.
workflow_preservation.customization: preserved as an opt-in local workspace editor.

documentation_updates: README.md notes that Customize Layout is optional local personalization and that the stable default Overview remains the recommended demo layout.
docs/demo/cfs_demo_walkthrough.md adds the same brief demo note.
docs/demo/cfs_final_demo_checklist.md adds a check that Customize Layout is small/optional and edit handles are hidden by default.

notes: Phase 25B changed only frontend layout behavior, documentation copy, and regression tests.
Safety keyword scan over src and backend/app found existing internal Model Lab schema/service fields and explicit safety flags only.
Browser smoke verified no prediction_probability or raw_model_score text appears in Model Lab mode.

validation_results.npm_run_build_webpack: passed after rerun with a larger timeout; first run timed out without returning a build error
validation_results.python_m_compileall_app: exit 0, but repository has no top-level app package to list

smoke_test_results.localhost_3000_loads: passed; Cabarrus FutureScape loaded after restarting stale local dev server
smoke_test_results.default_overview_stable: passed; command center visible, map central, right intelligence visible, left layer rail collapsed
smoke_test_results.no_edit_handles_by_default: passed; zero workspace tiles, zero drag handles, zero resize handles in default Overview
smoke_test_results.customize_button: passed; one small Customize Layout button visible in normal mode
smoke_test_results.customize_enters_edit_mode: passed; editor toolbar, workspace tiles, drag handles, and resize handles appear only after clicking Customize Layout
smoke_test_results.done_exits_edit_mode: passed; Done removes edit toolbar and handles
smoke_test_results.reset_returns_default: passed; Reset Layout returns to stable default with zero workspace tiles and collapsed layer rail
smoke_test_results.search_parcel: passed; search input received focus with aria-label Search parcels
smoke_test_results.model_lab: passed; Model Lab controls/intelligence visible and no exact probability/raw score labels visible
smoke_test_results.browser_console: not captured; in-app browser wrapper did not expose console message retrieval in this session

remaining_known_issues: The optional custom editor remains available after Done until the user chooses Reset Layout; this is intentional for users who opted into a custom workspace.
Manual pointer-drag QA in a normal browser is still recommended for the custom editor because the in-app browser automation surface is limited for drag streams.
The local dev server on port 3000 had to be restarted because an old node process was accepting the port but timing out.
